case_title: HOTEL ESSEX, L.P VS. MARY MYERS ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, MARY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTEL ESSEX, L.P AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS, MARY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOTEL ESSEX, L.P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYERS, MARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 684 ELLIS STREET, #404, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
